arts.ttl: Abuse would lead me to walk away from Man Utd - Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says he would walk away if he gets "abused" by fans in the same way the Glazer family have.

arts.ttl: Back to Man Utd? Chelsea reveal stance on permanent Sancho transfer
arts.sum: However, according to Ben Jacobs, Chelsea are expected to complete the purchase of Sancho and all parties appear content with the deal that was negotiated last summer. Chelsea will not send Jadon Sancho back to Manchester United this summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United hero destroys stars for FAKING IT under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a nightmare season and former star Gordon Strachan has taken aim at players who are just 'floating along' at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd snubbed FIVE managers to appoint boss Sir Jim Ratcliffe says was mistake
arts.sum: Manchester United chief Sir Jim Ratcliffe believes the appointment of David Moyes as Sir Alex Ferguson's replacement was an error, with it later revealed that five other managers were considered

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim 'desperate to sign' Sporting Lisbon star after Geovany Quenda blow
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly pushing to sign Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Manchester United see player as ‘ideal reinforcement’ – Clause gives them advantage, set to be transfer window star
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen is considered an ‘ideal reinforcement’ by Manchester United as they plan another refresh of their forward line. That’s according to journalist Niccolò Ceccarini, via Tuttomercatoweb, who reports that Manchester United can take advantage of a €75m clause that is only valid for sides outside of Italy. Ceccarini looks at various potential transfer activity The post Manchester United see player as ‘ideal reinforcement’ – Clause gives them advantage, set to be transfer window star appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe names decision Man Utd should NOT have let Sir Alex Ferguson make
arts.sum: When Sir Alex Ferguson walked away from Manchester United and retired, he was given the authority to handpick his replacement at Old Trafford - something co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says should never have happened

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim baffled by 'one thing' most Man United supporters tell him
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has been left pleasantly surprised by what Manchester United supporters have been telling him about the job he is doing at Old Trafford so far

arts.ttl: Man United 'have £55m bid rejected' for Barca star as Hansi Flick opens door to potential departure
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly fail with a £55m bid for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong, who is in the final 18 months of his contract at Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Report: Ruben Amorim asks Man United to sign 58 G/A star this summer
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has reportedly asked for the club to seal the signing of Sporting Lisbon goal machine Viktor Gyokeres this summer. Amorim only left Sporting to take over at Man Utd a few months ago, but it’s not too surprising to see that he’s eager to raid his former club already.
